jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at 5paisa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, 5paisa in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About 5paisa:
5paisa is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa!
